---
pagetitle: "Raphael Ludwig"
page-layout: custom
toc: false
title-block-banner: false
include-before-body: assets/html/particles-embed.html
include-after-body:
  - assets/html/particles-scripts.html
  - assets/html/palette-switcher-embed.html
listing:
  id: home-listing
  contents:
    - exercises/*.qmd
    - "!exercises/index.qmd"
  type: default
  sort: "date desc"
  max-items: 3
  fields: [title, description, date, categories]
---

::: {.home-grid}

::: {.home-left}

![](assets/img/monogram.svg){.home-photo}

<!-- TODO: replace with a playful photo, e.g. ![](assets/img/photo.jpg){.home-photo} -->

# Raphael Ludwig
Quantitative Economist — Macro Research & Applied Econometrics

::: {.about-block}
### Previous positions
Economist, Vista Capital (2020–2026)
:::

::: {.about-block}
### Education
MSc Economics, PUC-Rio (2019–2021) · BSc Economics, PUC-Rio (2013–2017)
:::

::: {.about-block}
### Interests
Forecasting & nowcasting, applied econometrics, macro-political scenario analysis, time series, machine learning
:::

::: {.contact-links}
[LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/in/raphael-ludwig-167347414) ·
[Email](mailto:raphaludwig@gmail.com) ·
[CV (PDF)](cv/Raphael_Ludwig_CV.pdf){.btn-hero .btn-outline}
:::

:::

::: {.home-right}
## Latest exercises

:::{#home-listing}
:::

[View more →](exercises/index.qmd){.view-more}
:::

:::
